calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Set For Trial On Sep-21-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-20-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Ethel Delores Smith's unopposed motion for withdrawal of attorney of record is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is directed to submit a proposed order using Judicial Council Form MC-053 and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/SKF)
